Name: Discovery
Description: Clarify scope, identify risk, and prepare the delivery baseline.

Name: Stakeholder interviews
Description: Interview sponsors and operators to confirm requirements and constraints.

Name: Solution outline
Description: Draft the technical shape, delivery phases, and milestone plan.

Name: Implementation
Description: Build the approved scope and verify it against the release criteria.

Name: Backend services
Description: Implement APIs, orchestration, and deployment support.

Name: Frontend workflows
Description: Ship the operator screens and user-facing polish for launch.

Name: Go-live review
Description: Decision point for release readiness and launch approval.
